name: io.github.dokmatiq/docgen
title: Dokmatiq DocGen
description: PDF/DOCX/Excel generation with stationery overlay, ZUGFeRD/XRechnung, signing, receipt OCR.

environmentVariables.name: DOCGEN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Dokmatiq API key (get one at https://developer.dokmatiq.com)

environmentVariables.name: DOCGEN_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default: https://api.dokmatiq.com)
